entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: All may be recorded for quality and training purposes. Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Yes, this is Marcus. I need to ask a few questions before booking.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please tell me your date of birth.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure. It’s August 22, 1990. Now, do you accept COBRA insurance?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I'm checking your chart now. Thanks, Marcus. How can I help you today?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I need to know if you accept COBRA insurance. Can you confirm that for me specifically?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check that for you. I do not see any insurance on file right now. For COBRA, we would need the plan details to confirm whether it is accepted. If you want, I can help with that next.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I understand, but generally, do you accept COBRA plans or not? I really need a clear yes or no on that.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: We checked that for you. I'm going to connect you to our clinic support team. Please stay on the line. Connecting you to a representative. Please wait. Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.
